creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 199666
corrected patch to update SAGA GIS to 7.0.0, including saga_cmd now

Hi Wen,

Thanks for taking this PR and sorry for my wrong patch. I don't know, how this happend.

saga_cmd is now included again in pkg-plist. As far as I can see, both reported errors happened in the stage area and had to do with the absence of saga_cmd.
